title: Shining Light

sections.label: Lyrics
lines: You are my safe place where I run free
In Your hands I’ve found the key
Every step I take You guide me true
In Your light I’m born anew

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: I won’t chase idols
I won’t bow Your love is my treasure now
In my heart Your counsel stays
Guiding me through all my days

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Joy fills my soul with endless springs
In Your presence freedom sings
You’ve shown me paths of life divine
At Your right hand pleasures shine

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: My heart is glad my spirit soars
In Your grace my soul implores
Even in the night I hear Your voice
With You beside me I rejoice

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Joy fills my soul with endless springs
In Your presence freedom sings
You’ve shown me paths of life divine
At Your right hand pleasures shine

sections.label: Bridge
lines: No fear shall shake me no grave confound
In Your embrace I’m safe and sound
Eternal pleasures Your love designs
In You forever I’ll be aligned

epigraph: at thy right hand there are pleasures for evermore
